image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'The table shows some of the values', so required values are in the image/table

multi_step: solving h'(2) for h(x)=f(g(x)) requires applying the chain rule, not just direct lookup
the chain rule requires combining multiple table entries such as g(2), f'(g(2)), and g'(2)
multiple-choice format does not remove the underlying multi-step reasoning
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is '-1', which is easy to compare against a derived result
choices are provided, enabling exact answer checking
the expected computation path is structured: read table values and apply a standard derivative rule
